$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the bundled starter decks. Consumed by two sides that must never drift: the web client (clients/web/src/decklists.ts imports this to populate the lobby) and the engine's agent-vs-agent wire test (crates/rune-cli/tests/agent_game.rs reads this file verbatim and plays every deck to a deterministic completion through the real server). Cards are referenced by authored functional_id only (ADR 0018 §3) — this file encodes no rules, costs, or legality; the server validates every submitted deck against its catalog. Format: 40-card minimum, at most four copies of any non-basic card, basic lands exempt. Every non-land card is castable from its deck's own basic-land base.

decks.name: Ashenvault Raiders
decks.summary: Red-black aggression: fast creatures backed by burn and removal.

decks.name: Sunwreath Vanguard
decks.summary: Green-white midrange: sturdy creatures with lifegain and removal.

decks.name: Tidewatch Adepts
decks.summary: Mono-blue tempo: flyers and card draw behind counters and a mana rock.
